message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve north american food
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 15:45 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on monday
The train should arrive by 16:45 and should go to stevenage
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
